notely.help.title: Syntax Help
notely.help.content:
# Heading H1
## Heading H2
### Heading H3
---
> Quote
`Code in text`
---
[ ] Task not completed
[x] Task completed
---
Plain text. Push 📌 for pin.
RMB on a note in menu.
Ctrl+Backspace — clean word.
